prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年河北省物理类最低位次分别为约10048→11821→17039→22433→23383，整体呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约13335名；2025年基准位次约23383名，较2024年仅后移约950名，后移速度有所放缓；该校在河北省物理类招生计划2021年32人→2022年35人→2023年36人→2024年45人→2025年53人→2026年56人，连续6年扩招，2026年较2025年增加3人（+5.7%），扩招趋势明显，一定程度上缓解了竞争压力，但扩招幅度较前两年（2024年+9人、2025年+8人）有所收窄。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京工业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第65名（2025年第72名、2024年第66名），近年排名在60–72区间波动，2026年回升至65名，整体处于全国中上水平，在北京市属高校中唯一进入211，对考生有稳定吸引力；2026年高考周期内声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及一名拟录取研究生因在社交平台发表不当言论被取消拟录取资格的事件，对学校形象有一定负面影响但波及范围有限；抖音热度排名第57（较热），综合热度约55万，短视频平台关注度处于中等偏上水平，未出现明显爆火或断崖式降温信号；历史投档异常记录中未见该校在河北省有明显断档；第五轮学科评估中，环境科学与工程获评A，光学工程、土木工程、材料科学与工程、软件工程获评A-，共5个A-及以上学科；其中土木类、环境科学与工程类为该校传统优势招生专业，但土木建筑类专业社会热度近年持续走低（2024–2025年分化观望至明显劝退），可能拉低相关专业录取位次。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门工科专业社会热度持续高热推荐，该校在机器人工程、信息安全（实验班）、机械类等方向有布局，对高分考生有一定吸引力；土木建筑类专业社会热度明显降温，该校土木类、城乡规划等专业可能面临报考热度下降；河北省2026年普通高考总人数约60.98万，按近年物理类占比约59%估算，物理类考生约35.98万人，与2025年36.30万人基本持平，竞争规模未出现大幅波动；北京工业大学位于北京市（非河北省），在河北省物理类招生计划从2021年32人持续扩至2026年56人，招生规模逐年扩大，体现了该校对河北生源的重视；该校为北京市属高校，本地（北京）招生占比较高，在河北省属于外埠招生，无特殊地域偏好。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划继续小幅扩招（+3人/+5.7%）、河北省物理类考生总数基本持平、学校声誉偏负面但影响有限、土木建筑类专业社会热度降温等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年23383名基础上继续后移，但后移幅度较前两年有所收窄。预测最低位次约23977名，区间23477–24477名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 机器人工程
- 信息安全（实验班）（不招色盲）
- 机械类（含机械工程、智能制造工程、增材制造工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 交通运输类（实验班）（含交通工程、交通设备与控制工程；不招色盲）
- 智能建造（不招色盲）
- 大数据管理与应用
- 会计学
- 生物医学工程（不招色盲）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 环境科学与工程类（含环境科学、环境工程；不招色弱色盲）
- 土木类（含土木工程、给排水科学与工程、建筑环境与能源应用工程；不招色盲）
- 城乡规划（不招色弱色盲）
- 工商管理。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间23477–24477名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间上限（如23000名以内）可重点冲击机器人工程、信息安全（实验班）等热门工科专业；位次在区间中段（约23700–24200名）建议以智能建造、大数据管理与应用、会计学等二档专业为核心；位次接近区间下限（约24400名以后）应优先考虑三档专业保底，同时注意土木类、环境类等专业社会热度偏低，录取概率较高但需结合个人兴趣。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category in Hebei Province were approximately 10048 → 11821 → 17039 → 22433 → 23383, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 13335 positions over the past 4 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 23383, only about 950 positions behind 2024, indicating a slowdown in the backward shift; the enrollment plan for this university in the Physics Category in Hebei Province was 32 in 2021 → 35 in 2022 → 36 in 2023 → 45 in 2024 → 53 in 2025 → 56 in 2026, with continuous expansion for 6 consecutive years, with an increase of 3 students (+5.7%) in 2026 compared to 2025, showing a clear expansion trend, which to some extent alleviates competition pressure, but the expansion rate has narrowed compared to the previous two years (2024 +9, 2025 +8).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 65th in 2026 (72nd in 2025, 66th in 2024), fluctuating between 60 and 72 in recent years, returning to 65th in 2026, overall at the upper-middle level nationally, and is the only 211 university among Beijing municipal universities, maintaining stable appeal to candidates; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving an incident where a prospective graduate student had their admission canceled due to inappropriate remarks on social media, which had a certain negative impact on the university's image but limited scope; Douyin popularity ranking is 57th (relatively hot), with comprehensive popularity around 550,000, indicating moderate to high attention on short video platforms, without obvious signals of sudden popularity or cliff-like decline; no obvious gaps in historical admission records for this university in Hebei Province; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Environmental Science and Engineering received an A rating, and Optical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, and Software Engineering received A- ratings, totaling 5 disciplines at A- or above; among them, Civil Engineering and Environmental Science and Engineering are traditional advantageous enrollment majors, but the social popularity of civil and architectural majors has been declining in recent years (from differentiation and wait-and-see in 2024–2025 to obvious discouragement), which may lower the admission rankings for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, and this university has offerings in Robotics Engineering, Information Security (Experimental Class), and Mechanical Engineering, attracting high-scoring candidates; the social popularity of civil and architectural majors has significantly cooled, and majors like Civil Engineering and Urban and Rural Planning at this university may face declining application enthusiasm; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Hebei Province is about 609,800, with an estimated 359,800 candidates in the Physics Category based on the recent proportion of about 59%, roughly the same as the 363,000 in 2025, indicating no significant fluctuation in competition scale; Beijing University of Technology is located in Beijing (not Hebei Province), and its enrollment plan in the Physics Category in Hebei Province has continuously expanded from 32 in 2021 to 56 in 2026, reflecting the university's emphasis on Hebei students; as a Beijing municipal university, it has a high proportion of local (Beijing) enrollment, and in Hebei Province, it is considered out-of-province enrollment, with no special regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the continued slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+3 students/+5.7%), the roughly stable total number of Physics Category candidates in Hebei Province, the slightly negative but limited impact on university reputation, and the cooling social popularity of civil and architectural majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 ranking of 23383, but the backward shift will narrow compared to the previous two years. The predicted minimum ranking is about 23977, with a range of 23477–24477.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Robotics Engineering
- Information Security (Experimental Class) (No color blindness)
- Mechanical Engineering (including Mechanical Engineering, Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering, Additive Manufacturing Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Transportation Engineering (Experimental Class) (including Traffic Engineering, Traffic Equipment and Control Engineering; No color blindness)
- Intelligent Construction (No color blindness)
- Big Data Management and Application
- Accounting
- Biomedical Engineering (No color blindness).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Environmental Science and Engineering (including Environmental Science, Environmental Engineering; No color weakness or blindness)
- Civil Engineering (including Civil Engineering, Water Supply and Drainage Science and Engineering, Building Environment and Energy Application Engineering; No color blindness)
- Urban and Rural Planning (No color weakness or blindness)
- Business Administration.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 23477–24477, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. For rankings significantly above the upper limit of the range (e.g., within 23000), focus on popular engineering majors like Robotics Engineering and Information Security (Experimental Class); for rankings in the middle of the range (approximately 23700–24200), prioritize Tier 2 majors such as Intelligent Construction, Big Data Management and Application, and Accounting; for rankings near the lower limit of the range (e.g., after 24400), prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety options, noting that majors like Civil Engineering and Environmental Engineering have lower social popularity, offering higher admission probability but requiring personal interest.
